detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MonkeyMayhem._transfer(address,address,uint256) (MonkeyMayhem.sol#663-787):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (MonkeyMayhem.sol#727)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (MonkeyMayhem.sol#801-813)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (MonkeyMayhem.sol#733)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (MonkeyMayhem.sol#821)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (MonkeyMayhem.sol#785)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (MonkeyMayhem.sol#947)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (MonkeyMayhem.sol#927)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (MonkeyMayhem.sol#929)
	MonkeyMayhem._rOwned (MonkeyMayhem.sol#339) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MonkeyMayhem._takeTeam(uint256) (MonkeyMayhem.sol#941-949)
	- MonkeyMayhem._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (MonkeyMayhem.sol#901-937)
	- MonkeyMayhem.balanceOf(address) (MonkeyMayhem.sol#489-493)
	- MonkeyMayhem.constructor() (MonkeyMayhem.sol#423-453)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (MonkeyMayhem.sol#785)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (MonkeyMayhem.sol#955)
	MonkeyMayhem._rTotal (MonkeyMayhem.sol#351) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MonkeyMayhem._getCurrentSupply() (MonkeyMayhem.sol#1097-1107)
	- MonkeyMayhem._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (MonkeyMayhem.sol#953-959)
	- MonkeyMayhem.constructor() (MonkeyMayhem.sol#423-453)
	- MonkeyMayhem.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (MonkeyMayhem.sol#585-607)
